mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment rates signal deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce corporate profit expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite rising unemployment.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in industrial production and rising inflation signals supply-side shocks that increase corporate costs and reduce equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Combined INDPRO/CPIAUCSL signals fail to predict negative returns in > 50% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth signals robust economic demand that boosts corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in high GDP growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with declining unemployment signals a tightening labor market that increases wage pressures and corporate margins, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Combined PAYEMS/UNRATE signals fail to predict positive returns in > 50% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts signal weak demand for construction, reducing corporate revenues and leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite declining housing starts.

mechanism_narrative: Low federal funds rates combined with rising inflation signals monetary policy accommodation that supports equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Combined FEDFUNDS/CPIAUCSL signals fail to predict positive returns in > 50% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer spending (RSAFS) signals strong demand that boosts corporate revenues, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in high RSAFS periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
